nasb.text: But when Pharaoh saw that the rain and the hail and the thunder had ceased, he sinned again and hardened his heart, he and his servants.

esv.text: But when Pharaoh saw that the rain and the hail and the thunder had ceased, he sinned yet again and hardened his heart, he and his servants.

cnv.text: 法老看見雨水、冰雹和雷聲都止住了，就更加犯罪，他和他的臣僕都心裡剛硬。

ccb.text: 法老看见灾祸停止，就又犯罪，他和他的臣仆都心里顽固。
